dict.source: A coordinated look out of the box. Each preset works in both Dark and Light mode — just pick one and go.
dict.target: 开箱即用的协调外观。每个预设在深色和浅色模式下均可使用——只需选择一个即可开始。

dict.source: Adjust background opacity when True Glass is enabled. 0 = fully transparent.
dict.target: 启用真玻璃时调整背景不透明度。0 = 完全透明。

dict.source: **Auto** uses a blurred wallpaper in Dark mode and a soft gradient in Light mode. All other styles apply to both modes at once.
dict.target: **自动**模式在深色模式下使用模糊壁纸，在浅色模式下使用柔和渐变。所有其他样式同时应用于两种模式。

dict.source: Choose what appears behind your notes.
dict.target: 选择笔记背后显示的内容。

dict.source: Paste your image URL. Example: url('https://example.com/photo.jpg'). Works in both Dark and Light mode.
dict.target: 粘贴您的图片 URL。示例：url('https://example.com/photo.jpg')。在深色和浅色模式下均可使用。

dict.source: First color of the gradient (top-left corner at default angle).
dict.target: 渐变的第一种颜色（默认角度下为左上角）。

dict.source: Second color of the gradient (bottom-right corner at default angle).
dict.target: 渐变的第二种颜色（默认角度下为右下角）。

dict.source: Direction of the gradient. 0 = top to bottom, 90 = left to right, 135 = diagonal.
dict.target: 渐变的方向。0 = 从上到下，90 = 从左到右，135 = 对角线。

dict.source: Blur intensity on the background. Higher = smoother look, more GPU cost.
dict.target: 背景的模糊强度。越高 = 外观越平滑，GPU 成本越高。

dict.source: Blur on panels like Command Palette, Settings, and context menus.
dict.target: 对命令面板、设置和上下文菜单等面板的模糊效果。

dict.source: A color overlay applied on top of the background. Works in both Dark and Light mode. Set Intensity to 0 to disable — zero performance cost when off.
dict.target: 应用在背景之上的颜色叠加层。在深色和浅色模式下均可使用。将强度设为 0 可禁用——关闭时无性能成本。

dict.source: Pick any color to overlay on the background.
dict.target: 选择任意颜色叠加在背景上。

dict.source: How strongly the tint is applied. 0 = off, 0.3 = strong.
dict.target: 色调应用的强度。0 = 关闭，0.3 = 强。

dict.source: Adjust the overall speed of all transitions and animations. Warning: Very long speeds will cause layout delay or micro-stutters.
dict.target: 调整所有过渡和动画的整体速度。警告：过长的速度会导致布局延迟或微卡顿。

dict.source: Turn off smooth scale + fade when opening any modal or settings window.
dict.target: 关闭打开任何模态框或设置窗口时的平滑缩放+淡入效果。
禁用启动动画（启动画面）

dict.source: Turn off the fade-in and scale-up reveal of the vault workspace on startup.
dict.target: 关闭启动时保险库工作区的淡入和缩放显示效果。

dict.source: Turn off the material pop animation and dynamic padding when focusing headers.
dict.target: 关闭聚焦标题时的材质弹出动画和动态内边距。

dict.source: Turn off the horizontal push animation for bold, italics, and other inline formatting.
dict.target: 关闭加粗、斜体及其他内联格式的水平推移动画。

dict.source: Slide-up + fade when opening or switching notes.
dict.target: 打开或切换笔记时，采用向上滑动并淡入的效果。

dict.source: Kill switch — turns off every animation in Obsidian.
dict.target: 总开关——关闭 Obsidian 中的所有动画。

dict.source: Always show scrollbars instead of hiding them until hover.
dict.target: 始终显示滚动条，而非仅在悬停时才显示。

dict.source: Remove the dot grid from the Canvas background.
dict.target: 移除画布背景上的点状网格。

dict.source: Maximum width of the note editor.
dict.target: 笔记编辑器的最大宽度。

dict.source: Visibility of subtle borders on tables and horizontal rules. 0 = invisible.
dict.target: 表格和水平分隔线上细微边框的可见度。0 表示不可见。

dict.source: Apply your accent color to headings, icons, and sliders throughout the UI.
dict.target: 将你的主题色应用于整个界面中的标题、图标和滑块。

dict.source: Use the default red color (var(--text-error)) for sync status errors instead of the theme's muted color.
dict.target: 使用默认的红色（var(--text-error)）来显示同步状态错误，而非主题的柔和颜色。
禁用侧边栏变暗效果（测试版）

dict.source: Removes the dimming and blur effect from sidebars. This only makes sense when sliding sidebars are enabled.
dict.target: 移除侧边栏的变暗和模糊效果。此选项仅在启用滑动侧边栏时有意义。
